basic_details.job_title: BHU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Research Assistant, Field Investigator Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Project Staff posts! Published recently on the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the 28–30 years age group and possessing a Post-Graduate degree in Social Science (minimum 55% marks) can apply offline till 14 May 2026. Find all details about the BHU Project Staff new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application process, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.age_details: Research Assistant: Max 28 years (relaxable). Field Investigator: Max 30 years (relaxable).
age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age is 28 years. Age relaxation: 5 years for female/SC/ST/physically handicapped candidates; 3 years for OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduate in Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Post-Graduate in Social Science discipline (55% minimum) with NET /M.Phil. / Ph.D. Field Investigator: Post-Graduate in Social Science discipline with minimum 55% marks.

selection_process: Test/Interview for research positions Skill test and examination for non-research positions Selection by duly constituted Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BHU Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BHU Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the BHU Project Staff recruitment is 14-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at BHU?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for Project Staff posts at Banaras Hindu University. These include one Research Assistant and one Field Investigator position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Post-Graduate degree in a Social Science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks. Specific additional qualifications may apply for the Research Assistant role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for these Project Staff positions ranges from ₹20,000 to ₹37,000 per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Project Staff posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Research Assistant post is a maximum of 28 years, and for the Field Investigator post, it is a maximum of 30 years. Age relaxations are applicable.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxations are available. Candidates belonging to female/SC/ST/physically handicapped categories can get a relaxation of 5 years, and OBC candidates can get a relaxation of 3 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the BHU Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a test/interview for research positions and a skill test and examination for non-research positions, followed by selection by a duly constituted Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the BHU official website. Direct links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates along with the application form.
